reasoning: The informal statement says: for an integral extension R'/R of commutative rings, rad(R) = rad(R') ∩ R where rad denotes the nilradical. The Lean formalization states nilradical R = Ideal.comap (algebraMap R R') (nilradical R'), which is exactly the statement that the nilradical of R equals the contraction (preimage under the structure map) of the nilradical of R'. The hypothesis Algebra.IsIntegral R R' encodes the integral extension condition. This is logically equivalent to the informal claim.
